name: Black Forest Mini Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Line muffin cups (2-3/4 inches in diameter) with foil baking cups.
3. Place one vanilla wafer cookie, flat-side down, in the bottom of each cup.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Add sugar, cocoa, and flour; blend well.
5. Add eggs; beat well. Stir in sour cream and almond extract.
6. Fill each muffin cup almost full with batter.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and let cool for 5 to 10 minutes.
8. Spread a heaping teaspoonful of sour cream topping on each cup. Let cool completely in the pan on a wire rack; refrigerate.
9. Just before serving, garnish with canned cherry pie filling.
10. Cover leftovers and refrigerate. Makes about 1-1/2 to 2 dozen cheesecakes.
